## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the issue.

## Environment
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 120]
- **OS**: [e.g. Windows 11]
- **Component**: [e.g. Student Dashboard, Mock Exam, ML API, Hint System]

## Additional Context
